## Week in Review: 2026-06-15 to 2026-06-21

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 29.1.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 4.0 (-20.0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 1.9 (-27.8% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.21)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 2.0 (+7.7% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 29.1 (-34.4% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.24)
